name: @open-cowork/gateway-provider-whatsapp
description: WhatsApp bridge channel provider for the Open Cowork gateway
author: Joe Broadhead

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && tsc
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-whatsapp build && node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types --test src/*.test.ts
